userMessage: Build a workflow that reads new rows from a Google Sheet, summarizes each row with OpenAI, and posts the summary to a Slack channel.
rationale: A build touching multiple unfamiliar external services must run pre-build discovery via the typed discover-workflow-context tool, not the generic agent delegate tool. discover-workflow-context is the single, schema-validated route to the workflow-context-scout specialist in v1 — routing through agent would create a second, looser path to the same specialist.
